message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 2. プロフィール編集

actor "お嬢" as Hostess
participant "CABABA" as Cababa
database "データベース" as Database
participant "LINE" as Line

rectangle "登録" {
    Hostess -> Cababa: ログイン画面
    activate Cababa
    Cababa --> Hostess: LINEへリダイレクト
    deactivate Cababa
    
    Hostess -> Line: LINEログイン画面
    activate Line
    Line --> Cababa: リダイレクト (line_user_id)
    deactivate Line
    
    activate Cababa
    Cababa -> Database: INSERT User
    activate Database
    Database --> Cababa
    deactivate Database
    
    Cababa --> Hostess: プロフィール登録ページ
    deactivate Cababa
    
    Hostess -> Cababa: プロフィール送信
    activate Cababa
    Cababa -> Database: INSERT HostessProfile
    activate Database
    Database --> Cababa
    deactivate Database
    
    Cababa --> Hostess: 登録完了画面
    deactivate Cababa
}
@enduml
```
